overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking and briefly riding a horse along a dirt path through a dark, stormy forest at night. The character passes by a small wooden village settlement with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance, creating a moody, atmospheric fantasy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: character mounts horse and begins riding briefly
character dismounts horse and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: walking through dense forest, briefly mounts a horse for a short ride, then dismounts to continue on foot along the winding dirt path

entered.detail: tall dark pine trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
distant mountain range visible through gaps in the trees
large moss-covered rock outcrops alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense, dark forest at night with storm clouds overhead. The character walks along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall trees and rocky outcrops. Briefly, the character mounts a horse and rides for a few seconds before dismounting to continue walking through the enclosed woodland trail.

events.description: wooden village buildings become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path as the dense forest opens up into a clearing, approaching a small village settlement

entered.detail: traditional wooden structures with thatched roofs visible ahead

changed.to: sparse trees at left_far and right_mid

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the dense forest gives way to a more open clearing. The tree canopy opens up to reveal the stormy night sky, and traditional wooden village buildings with thatched roofs come into view in the distance ahead, nestled against the backdrop of snow-capped mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with stone wall boundaries

events.description: character passes the wooden village buildings on the left side
stone wall appears running parallel to the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the village structures and continuing along a path now bordered by a low stone wall on the left

entered.detail: weathered stone wall running alongside the dirt path
simple wooden fence marking field boundaries
dense dark forest visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the village buildings, which recede behind on the left. A weathered stone wall appears running parallel to the path, while wooden fence posts line the right side. The terrain opens up further, revealing a distant tree line of dense forest ahead under the stormy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path toward distant forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open path through grassland toward the distant forest tree line

entered.detail: expansive grassy fields on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the stone walls and fences fall away, leaving an expansive open grassland. The character continues along the dirt path toward a dense forest tree line that looms closer ahead. The stormy sky is fully visible overhead, with the snow-capped mountains still visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, stormy forest that gradually opens into a wide vista of a remote mountain village. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by tall trees and rocky outcrops under a dark, clouded night sky. As the character briefly mounts and then dismounts a horse, the camera continues forward through the enclosed woodland trail. The scene then expands as the dense forest gives way to an open clearing, revealing the stormy sky above. Finally, the view opens to show traditional wooden buildings with thatched roofs nestled against a backdrop of distant, snow-capped mountains.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined village outskirts into an expansive, stormy wilderness. It begins as the character walks past wooden village buildings that recede to the left, while a weathered stone wall and wooden fence posts frame the dirt path. As the character advances, the terrain opens up, revealing a distant tree line of dense forest under a dark, turbulent sky. The scene then shifts as the walls and fences fall away entirely, leaving the path surrounded by open grassland. Finally, the camera pushes forward toward the looming forest edge, with snow-capped mountains remaining visible in the far distance beneath the stormy night.
